hero.badge: More than 200 companies have already organized their house
hero.description: Organize your company's tools, materials, and assets in a simple, fast, and 100% free system.
hero.no_card: Free forever platform for small businesses. No credit card. No catches.

pain_points.title: Is your stock a money black hole?
pain_points.subtitle: If you still use paper or spreadsheets, you are probably losing money without realizing it.
pain_points.tools_desc: You buy, use once and nobody knows where it went. The loss is silent, but constant.
pain_points.spreadsheets_desc: The spreadsheet never matches reality. You lose hours counting stock and still have gaps.
pain_points.emergency_desc: Material runs out in the middle of the work or service. You pay more to replace urgently.

solution.title: Total control in the palm of your hand
solution.description: Ditch the spreadsheets and notebooks. Have a professional system that organizes your stock, controls who took what, and alerts you when you need to buy more.
solution.mobile_desc: Access from anywhere, whether on site or in the office.
solution.lost_desc: Know exactly who has each tool.
solution.alerts_desc: Get notified before stock runs out.

ai_features.title: Integrated Artificial Intelligence
ai_features.subtitle: Automate manual tasks and save time with the power of AI
ai_features.ocr_desc: Upload a photo of the invoice and let AI identify and register products automatically.
ai_features.search_desc: Find what you need by describing it in natural language (e.g., 'damaged cutting tools').
ai_features.autofill_desc: AI suggests categories, codes, and reorder points for your products.

features.support_desc: Agile and humanized service. Talk to those who understand the subject via WhatsApp, email or chat.
features.online_desc: Access Operium anytime, anywhere. From the office, home or directly from the work.
features.price_desc: Use Operium for free, with no time limit. We don't ask for a credit card and we don't enable automatic charges. If we launch paid plans with advanced features in the future, you only upgrade if you want to. Free access remains available for small businesses.

how_it_works.title: Simple as it should be
how_it_works.subtitle: Start using in less than 5 minutes, completely free.
how_it_works.step1_desc: Import your products or register in seconds.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Register entries and exits by cell phone.
how_it_works.step3_desc: View reports and know where each item is.

testimonials.title: Who uses, recommends
testimonials.subtitle: Join more than 200 companies that transformed their management
testimonials.t1_content: I lost about 500 reais a month just with small tools disappearing. Operium paid for itself in the first week.
testimonials.t2_content: I tried using 3 different systems, all very complicated. This one my team learned to use in 10 minutes.
testimonials.t3_content: PPE control is sensational. The system warns before expiring, I never paid a fine or took a risk again.

pricing.title: Fair price, no surprises
pricing.subtitle: Everything you need in a single plan.

cta_final.title: Organized warehouse without paying monthly fees.
cta_final.join: Free forever for small businesses. Start now.
